title: Asking for Directions
description: 12 key phrases for finding your way around — asking for directions, understanding responses, and locating landmarks.
situation: On the street, in a city centre, finding landmarks, buildings, and transport stops.

phrases.spanish: Está al final de la calle
phrases.english: It's at the end of the street
phrases.pronunciation: ehs-TAH ahl fee-NAHL deh lah KAH-yeh

phrases.spanish: Está a dos cuadras de aquí
phrases.pronunciation: ehs-TAH ah dohs KWAH-drahs deh ah-KEE

phrases.spanish: Está al lado de la iglesia
phrases.pronunciation: ehs-TAH ahl LAH-doh deh lah ee-GLEH-see-ah

phrases.english: Can you show me on the map?
phrases.pronunciation: meh PWEH-deh mohs-TRAHR ehn ehl MAH-pah
